content: [{"id":"45916fc1-6995-47cd-b74b-857d05aac414","component":"Section","data":{"title":"My projects","subtitle":"All the public projects I've contributed to or own.","align":"left","background":"none","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"aa013820-1d7c-4891-9627-636cd4e92db1","component":"Divider","data":{"variant":"spacer","size":"md","label":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"b82d34a1-3241-4e4e-8d7b-dbcdb6e2734c","component":"Section","data":{"title":"C#","subtitle":"My .NET projects","align":"left","background":"none","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"4821e0a0-ae3d-4529-aaf0-e30541cd27fe","component":"CarouselList","data":{},"children":[{"id":"2d129eab-d5c0-4110-b05a-22d60a8a150d","component":"Card","data":{"title":"PHP IL","subtitle":"C#","showFooter":false,"className":""},"children":[{"id":"c3e829ef-d5dd-4dda-bdb5-637be5e80934","component":"Text","data":{"content":"PHP-IL is an experimental PHP engine that runs PHP on the Common Language Runtime (CLR). It compiles PHP code into an intermediate language, allowing it to execute within the .NET ecosystem. This approach enables PHP applications to take advantage of the CLR’s runtime features while maintaining compatibility with standard PHP code.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"f10fedef-5b62-4c55-b998-77e57d1634ac","component":"Anchor","data":{"url":"https://github.com/hudson1998x/PHPIL","text":"View repository","target":"_blank","className":""},"children":[]}]},{"id":"a8269694-6317-4cd8-b961-a97f0d2d8625","component":"Card","data":{"title":"Socialstack","subtitle":"C#, TypeScript, SASS, NodeJS","showFooter":false,"className":""},"children":[{"id":"05ed41b8-8ad6-4c08-89f5-fd372160fb19","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Social Stack is a high-performance web framework built on Kestrel with a dependency injection first architecture. It focuses on efficient application development with features like pooled writers for low-allocation endpoints, automated TypeScript API generation, built-in SASS support, and a permissions system integrated at the core, making it a versatile platform for building modern web applications.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"288ee596-62e8-4efd-b117-cd226b53428c","component":"List","data":{"title":"","variant":"unordered","divided":false,"className":""},"children":[{"id":"5d6d85ac-b49f-4361-8796-ddf12bd5660d","component":"ListItem","data":{"className":""},"children":[{"id":"c204db03-d4c3-41f8-a59d-596888e00614","component":"Anchor","data":{"url":"https://github.com/socialstack-core/core2025/","text":"View repository","target":"_self","className":""},"children":[]}]},{"id":"6a77a36f-9e34-458f-b362-f73112516dd8","component":"ListItem","data":{"className":""},"children":[{"id":"c3284593-3265-494d-a675-9aeac0aabbf2","component":"Anchor","data":{"url":"/documents/7","text":"View my work","target":"_self","className":""},"children":[]}]}]}]},{"id":"20249e04-2439-4dbb-9970-5e4d2db91dc3","component":"Card","data":{"title":"InlineXML","subtitle":"C#","showFooter":false,"className":""},"children":[{"id":"a2b00e80-6d00-4566-90b6-b636bc13fe10","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Inline XML is a C# extension that brings JSX-style syntax to the language. Originally an experiment, it now includes a language server, a transformation pipeline, and a Visual Studio plugin to streamline working with XML-like markup directly in C# code.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"002648a0-e20b-4977-ab12-9207ede1531f","component":"Anchor","data":{"url":"https://github.com/InlineXML/binary","text":"View Repository","target":"_blank","className":""},"children":[]}]}]},{"id":"2a2e1032-f10a-4216-8799-6f4f00af9fa2","component":"Section","data":{"title":"NodeJS / TypeScript","subtitle":"My ECMA projects","align":"left","background":"none","className":""},"children":[{"id":"cc7970d8-c250-47d5-8e67-e50db4c453d0","component":"CarouselList","data":{},"children":[{"id":"44013382-843c-4a33-a337-8a91f2161445","component":"Card","data":{"title":"CodeFolio","subtitle":"TypeScript, SASS, NodeJS","showFooter":false,"className":""},"children":[{"id":"9e8789bd-7412-484e-88f2-061a7ff4581d","component":"Text","data":{"content":"CodeFolio is a git-first, local-first framework for building static websites, including portfolios, documentation, or blogs. Your content, configuration, and history live entirely in a Git repository, while the admin interface and live preview run offline. Deployment is simple; just push to GitHub Pages or any static host and your site is live without any extra infrastructure.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"a541104d-7b6f-4577-bcff-0121b52275e8","component":"Anchor","data":{"url":"https://github.com/hudson1998x/Codefolio","text":"View Repository","target":"_blank","className":""},"children":[]}]}]}]},{"id":"5b774007-1bb8-463f-b00f-c79772b38ce6","component":"Section","data":{"title":"PHP","subtitle":"My PHP Projects","align":"left","background":"none","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"1e5fa395-b481-4795-b907-d00de958cda1","component":"CarouselList","data":{},"children":[{"id":"04b637c0-32eb-4927-9dc6-3d86c5e87ab3","component":"Card","data":{"title":"Introspection","subtitle":"PHP","showFooter":false,"className":""},"children":[{"id":"656f63e9-6761-4c56-a260-9af5a18f6c86","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Introspection is a high‑performance PHP library that significantly speeds up reflection by using smart caching strategies, including in‑memory and filesystem caches, to avoid repeated parsing. It thoroughly captures metadata for classes, interfaces, traits, methods, properties, and attributes, and has been heavily unit tested to ensure reliability for frameworks, IDE tools, static analysis, and other systems that need fast, consistent reflection results.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"9d1dbac9-1ff6-4827-9238-a191849900a5","component":"Anchor","data":{"url":"https://github.com/hudsxncom/introspection","text":"View repository","target":"_blank","className":""},"children":[]}]},{"id":"4db25305-2b31-4061-80ce-c029164c832e","component":"Card","data":{"title":"Canvas","subtitle":"PHP","showFooter":false,"className":""},"children":[{"id":"24362e84-84ac-49a1-9f1e-2c850e800239","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Canvas is a flexible PHP templating and rendering engine focused on clean syntax and performance. It provides tools for composing and rendering views with minimal overhead, supports reusable components and layouts, and integrates easily into applications that need a simple but powerful way to handle dynamic HTML output.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"d29ece9e-26b1-4f12-91af-4566c0b170c9","component":"Anchor","data":{"url":"https://github.com/hudsxncom/canvas","text":"View repository","target":"_blank","className":""},"children":[]}]}]}]
